purpose: Baseline + scope-boundary contract for the /auto-optimize loop on the OPTIC-K embedding-quality domain (the 240-dim partition-weighted geometry that powers RAG). Consumed by .claude/skills/auto-optimize/SKILL.md.
metric_description: Random-forest cross-validation accuracy on a 6000-sample balanced classifier predicting voicing instrument from embedding vector. LOWER is better — the OPTIC-K geometry should be T-invariant / instrument-agnostic, so a perfect embedding scores near baseline_random (~0.333). Higher = the embedding leaks instrument identity, a known regression direction tracked since OPTIC-K v1.3.
primary_baseline_source: post-refactor run 2026-04-17T04:50:22Z (state/quality/embeddings/2026-04-17-postrefactor.json). Pre-refactor was 0.7473; postrefactor improved by +0.005, so the post-refactor accuracy IS the more conservative baseline (later refactors should not regress past it).

rollback_metadata.note: Validator ships in PR landing this baseline change. CRITICAL: this domain is LOWER-IS-BETTER (full_classifier_accuracy near baseline_random ~0.333 is ideal). delta > +regression_threshold = reject. Validator handles the polarity flip; do NOT replicate chatbot-qa's higher-is-better logic.

scope_boundary.note: EmbeddingSchema.cs is the canonical 240-dim contract — changing TotalDimension or partition layout is a one-way door per CLAUDE.md. Schema changes must come through a coordinated /feature plan, not from the auto-loop.

_open_gaps.snapshot_cadence: RESOLVED 2026-05-16 in PR #250 — .github/workflows/embeddings-snapshot.yml runs daily at 07:00 UTC. First production snapshot lands when the cron fires next.
_open_gaps.loader_filename_strictness: RESOLVED 2026-05-16 in PR #250 — workflow renames embedding-diagnostics-YYYY-MM-DD.json to canonical YYYY-MM-DD.json before commit.
_open_gaps.roundtrip_validator: RESOLVED 2026-05-16 in this PR — .claude/skills/embeddings-roundtrip-validate/SKILL.md mirrors chatbot-qa-roundtrip-validate with reversed metric polarity for lower-is-better.
_open_gaps.still_open_v2: Roundtrip-equivalence gate (golden voicings re-embedded must hit cosine < ε), per-partition reject gates, and trend-aware threshold derivation are documented in the validator SKILL.md `Open improvements` section. Not blockers for v1 of the unattended loop.
